channel.title: Douzi Lab · Daily Intel RSS
channel.description: Daily automated tech intelligence with AI scoring, bilingual coverage for developers.

item.title: 【重磅推荐】2026 年度 NVIDIA 创业企业展示现已启动招募！
item.description: NVIDIA 2026 startup program now open, key opportunity for tech entrepreneurs.

item.title: 【SpringBoot 3.x】夯爆了，数据库访问性能优化实战详解！
item.description: SpringBoot 3.x database performance optimization guide, highly technical.

item.description: Frontend to full-stack+AI development roadmap, highly practical

item.title: 如何实现 0 毫秒无感页面跳转？聊聊被低估的 Speculation Rules API
item.description: Exploring Speculation Rules API for seamless 0ms page transitions.

item.title: 从插件到 AI 辅助：Obsidian 如何成为我的主力工具
item.description: From plugins to AI, how Obsidian became my main tool.

item.description: The Witcher 3 to release new expansion 'Old Blood'.

item.description: DuckDuckGo installs rose up to 30% after Google's AI search shift.

item.title: MS Edge 被发现会在内存中明文加载所有密码
item.description: Edge loads passwords in plaintext, posing security risks

item.description: NVIDIA Dev Meetup: Infrastructure to agents deep dive

item.title: VS Code 默认在 commit 中插入 Co-Authored-by Copilot
item.description: VS Code now includes Co-Authored-by Copilot in commits by default

item.title: 杭州法院裁定以 AI 代替人类为由裁员是系违法
item.description: Hangzhou court rules AI-based layoffs illegal

item.title: Bigme 大我官宣下一代大双屏墨水屏智能手机开发中，将搭载天玑 8300 处理器
item.description: Bigme developing next dual-screen e-ink phone with Dimensity 8300.

item.title: 谷歌员工被指控利用公司内部信息，在预测平台获利 120 万美元
item.description: Google employee accused of profiting $1.2M via insider info on prediction platform

item.title: 联发科天玑 8550 处理器发布：全大核 8 核架构，最高 3.4GHz
item.description: MediaTek Dimensity 8550 launched with all-big-core 8-core design, up to 3.4GHz
